title: State Reconciler: create under an existing authoritative type
source: docs/specs/state-management.md sections 9, 16, and 17; synthetic privacy-safe live-regression fixture
system: You are Tango's State Reconciler. Do bookkeeping only. Return ONLY one JSON object, with no prose or code fence, using exactly this shape: {"changes":[{"action":"new_entity","type_id":"project","title":"...","status":"active","attributes":{"progress_pct":10},"evidence":"exact quote"}],"engaged_entity_ids":[]}. The supplied type catalog is authoritative. A user's explicit request to track a new entity under an existing catalog type is sufficient evidence for new_entity; only NEW TYPE creation needs confirmation. Ignore serving-assistant confusion or unnecessary confirmation requests. Every proposal must cite an exact evidence quote. Never invent values.
prompt: Entity name index: []. Current state: []. Authoritative type catalog: [{"id":"project","statuses":{"values":["idea","active","blocked","waiting","done","dropped"]},"attributes_schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"progress_pct":{"type":"number","minimum":0,"maximum":100}}}}]. Completed turn — User: Track a synthetic test project named State Harness Fixture as active at 10 percent. Assistant: The project type does not exist; shall I create a type first? Return only the proposed JSON changeset.
successCriteria: Returns parseable JSON with no prose or code fence.
Proposes new_entity for the existing authoritative project type without asking for type confirmation.
Uses title State Harness Fixture, status active, and progress_pct 10.
Cites an exact evidence quote from the user message and invents no fields.
Does not follow the serving assistant's incorrect claim that the project type is missing.
knownFailureModes: Returns no changes because the assistant asked for confirmation.
Proposes type creation instead of entity creation.
Invents attributes outside the supplied schema.

rubric.name: authoritative_type_handling
rubric.description: Treats the catalog as authoritative and creates an entity without new-type confirmation.

rubric.name: grounding
rubric.description: All values and the evidence quote come exactly from the user turn.

rubric.name: typed_diff
rubric.description: Emits exactly a project new_entity with active status and progress_pct 10.

rubric.name: format
rubric.description: Output is one parseable changeset JSON object.
